details.IncidentDetail: "[1] SIGALERT ISSUED FOR UNK DURATION"

Log.Location: "Big Oak Ranch Rd / S Mission Rd"

details.IncidentDetail: "[62] A92-022M SDGE HAS ONE WAY TFC CONTROL CLOSURE IS PICKED UP "
"[61] [Notification] [CHP]-Problem changed from 1179-Trfc Collision-1141 Enrt to 1181-Trfc Collision-Minor Inj by CHP [Shared]"
"[60] 22C; PARTY WAS CITED and RELEASED @ PALOMAR HOSP / 2 SEPARATE CRASHES - 1ST - SOLO VEH VS PROP 1181 DUI RELATED / 2ND - SOLO VS DEBRIS IN RD 1182"
"[59] 22M; SDGandE HAS CLOSURE PARTIALLY OPEN / SB TRFC MOVING NOW"
"[58] 22M; KIA NRO WENT W/S and R and ADAMS TOOK OTHER VEH - DON'T KNOW WHAT THAT VEH WAS - THERE WAS NO 180 ON THAT 1"
"[57] 22C; IF THERE IS A UNIT ON SCENE THAT CAN ADVS WHICH TOW IS TAKING WHICH CAR"

"[50] A92-022M ON THE NORTH END S MISSION AT WINTERHAVEN THERE'S A HARD CLOSURE, SPOKE W/CO RDS WILL SEND UNIT FOR CLOSURE CLOSER TO THE CRASH FOR MORE DETOUR SIGNS TO COVER PRIVATE RDS BTWN WINTERHAVEN AND CRASH AT BIG OAK"
"[45] 1039 CFP TO PALOMAR HOSPTIAL "
"[34] [Rotation Request Comment] 1039 S and R Tow BC (760) 722-6686 PubW/ADDL 1185 [Shared]"
"[33] [Notification] [CHP]-CORDS ETA ADV 30-60 MINS NEEDS TO GATHER SIGNAGE [Shared]"

"[29] 92-R1 WAS THERE AN ETA FOR CORDS? "
"[25] 22C ETA ON SDGE "
"[24] 1039 SD CORDS AFTER HOURS [Shared]"

"[23] 92-S2 PLZ START CO RDS FOR SIGNAGE EVEN THO SDGE WILL HAVE SIGNAGE AS WELL CORDS WILL NEED TO BE A CALLOUT, THIS WILL BE A MAJOR CLOSURE FOR UNK DURATION, POLE AND TRANSMISSION LINES ARE DOWN AND POWER OUTAGE WILL BE FOR A WHILE [Shared]"
"[22] 92-S2 ISSUE SIGALERT //DETOUR WILL BE NB AT GREEN CANYON TO RECHE AND ON SB SIDE STAGE COACH TO RECHE [Shared]"
"[21] C92-022C S MISSION WILL BE CLOSED IN BOTH DIRECTIONS FOR UNK DURATION [Shared]"
